description_long: This is a freestanding caution sign designed to alert drivers or pedestrians to a speed bump ahead. The sign features a rectangular yellow panel with a black border and bold black text reading 'CAUTION SPEED BUMP AHEAD.' The sign is mounted atop a slender metallic pole, which is anchored into a heavy, square concrete base for stability. The rear of the sign shows some weathering and rust stains, indicating outdoor use and exposure to the elements. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for placement in urban environments such as streets or parking lots. The sign is highly visible due to its bright yellow color and elevated position.
description: A yellow caution sign on a metal pole with a concrete base, warning of a speed bump ahead. The sign is weathered and designed for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow caution sign with clear black text and a sturdy pole anchored in a concrete base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the sign and pole, with the concrete base visible below.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sign, which has visible rust stains and weathering, and the pole extending down to the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim edge of the sign and the full height of the pole and base.
